For ICT, I don’t currently have an official ICT email address in the directory details available to me. The confirmed contact I have for ICT is their phone line: 09134273215 (ICT Centre, Main Campus).

Best way to get the correct email quickly: send a WhatsApp message or call that number and request the official ICT support email for your specific issue, then you can email them with your details and screenshots.

To help me guide you to the right email channel, is your issue about the student portal (login/registration/payment/result) or something else?

Contact Details: Bursary Unit

The Bursary Unit handles school fees, payment complaints, receipt issues, clearance verification, and financial inquiries.

This office handles: school fees, payment complaints, clearance/payment verification, receipt issues, financial inquiries
Handles fee-related complaints and payment verification.
